tluaMetatableImprecise.tlua(10,16): error TLUA2339: Property 'anything' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
tluaMetatableImprecise.tlua(15,16): error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
tluaMetatableImprecise.tlua(20,16): error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
tluaMetatableImprecise.tlua(25,19): error TLUA2339: Property 'anything' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
tluaMetatableImprecise.tlua(35,16): error TLUA2339: Property 'extra' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
tluaMetatableImprecise.tlua(43,55): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'missingName'.


==== tluaMetatableImprecise.tlua (6 errors) ====
    // The pairing is only as precise as the metatable's type. A metatable that does not say
    // which fallback applies leaves the call returning the plain table rather than guessing at a
    // wrong one.
    
    // The declared parameter type is exactly that: LuaMetatable<T> names every metamethod and
    // commits to none.
    declare declared: LuaMetatable<{ n: number }>;
    local d = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, declared);
    local dn: number = d.n;
    local dbad = d.anything;
                   ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'anything' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
    
    // A __index that is either a table or a function does not say which read wins.
    declare unionIndex: { __index: { a: number } | ((t: table, k: any) => string) };
    local u = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, unionIndex);
    local ubad = u.a;
                   ~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
    
    // A metatable that may not be there at all.
    declare maybe: { __index: { a: number } } | nil;
    local m = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, maybe);
    local mbad = m.a;
                   ~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
    
    // `nil` says there is no metatable.
    local none = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, nil);
    local nn: number = none.n;
    local nbad = none.anything;
                      ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'anything' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
    
    // A metatable with no __index has no fallback to merge, and no pairing is kept for it.
    local noIndex = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, { __tostring = function(t: table): string return "t"; end });
    local xn: number = noIndex.n;
    
    // A callable table would be indexed by Lua, but which half answers a read is not worth
    // guessing at.
    declare hybrid: { __index: { (t: table, k: any): string; extra: number } };
    local h = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, hybrid);
    local hbad = h.extra;
                   ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'extra' does not exist on type '{ n: number; }'.
    
    // __index declared optional strips its nil arm: what is left names one fallback.
    declare optional: { __index?: { a: number } };
    local o = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, optional);
    local oa: number = o.a;
    
    // An error inside the metatable literal is reported once.
    local bad = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, { __index = { a = missingName } });
                                                          ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'missingName'.
